title: crotalaria lundensis
intro: Crotalaria lundensis, also known as Lund's rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Crotalaria lundensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and possibly aiding in the treatment of certain diseases. Traditionally, this plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and herbal preparations.
